title: Ores
description: Craft ore blocks with raw ores and stone.
body:
Gold and iron with both deepslate and normal versions.

Make:
- gold ore with stone and raw gold
- deepslate gold ore with deepslate and raw gold
- same with iron and copper
- coal ore with coal and stone
- deepslate coal ore with deepslate and coal
- same with emeralds and diamonds
- nether quartz ore with quartz and netherack
- nether gold ore with gold nuggets and netherack

This datapack has no gameplay use at all other than asthetics and decorating your base.
